stemHtml: Two heavy aircraft are executing approaches on two parallel runways (08L and 08R). Due to poor visibility, both aircraft execute a missed approach. What is true about their missed approach tracks?

options.b: Both tracks should diverge by at least 60 degrees.
options.c: Both tracks should proceed parallel because simultaneous parallel approaches are in use.
options.d: Both tracks should diverge by at least 30 degrees.
